title: trollius micranthus
intro: Trollius micranthus, also known as the small-flowered globe-flower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Trollius micranthus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote digestion, while also acting as an antispasmodic to alleviate muscle cramps. Trollius micranthus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for use in traditional medicine.
